settings.page_subtitle: Share your vision for a bespoke necklace, handcrafted in Italy.
settings.heading: Defining Your Vision
settings.subheading: Share your concept — the symbols, proportions, mood, references, or even just a rough direction. We carefully study everything you provide to translate it into a clear creative direction.

settings.title: What Happens Next
settings.richtext: After you submit, here is how your piece comes to life.

settings.title: Design Concept Development
settings.text: 2–4 days. Design fee $29–$89. Our master jeweler creates three original design concepts based on your vision. You'll receive a refined digital visualization. Revisions included.

settings.title: Precision 3D Modeling
settings.text: 2–4 days. Quoted. 50% deposit before modeling begins. A detailed digital model is built. You'll receive an interactive 3D preview to examine from every angle.

settings.title: Handcrafted Production in Italy
settings.text: 10–15 days. Quoted. Remaining 50% before production. Experienced artisans bring your piece to life. Every detail inspected before completion.

settings.title: Secure Worldwide Delivery
settings.text: 5–10 business days. Free. Insured & tracked worldwide. Your piece is carefully packaged in our branded presentation box.

settings.title: Shipping and Returns
settings.content: Your piece is carefully packaged and insured for delivery. Shipping is free. Contact us for return policy details.

settings.title: Dimensions
settings.content: Final dimensions depend on your design and chain length. We'll confirm all details before production.

settings.title: Materials
settings.content: We work with sterling silver, gold (10K–24K), platinum, and quality stones. All materials are sourced with care.

settings.question: How long does a custom piece take?
settings.answer: From concept to delivery, typically 3–6 weeks depending on complexity and revisions.

settings.question: Can I send reference images?
settings.answer: Yes. Paste links to your images in the form (e.g. Google Drive, Dropbox), or we'll contact you to request references.

settings.question: What materials do you work with?
settings.answer: Sterling silver, 10K–24K gold (yellow, white, rose), platinum, and quality stones including lab-grown and natural diamonds.

settings.question: Is there a minimum budget?
settings.answer: Necklaces start around $820. We'll provide a detailed quote after reviewing your vision.

settings.question: Where are pieces made?
settings.answer: Our pieces are handcrafted by experienced artisans. We work with trusted workshops to ensure quality and ethical sourcing.

settings.question: Are all sales final?
settings.answer: Custom commissions are made to your specifications. Contact us for our return and revision policy.
